steps.title: Clear the denominator with y
steps.content:
Start with the given equation:
$$\frac{1}{5b}=\frac{9x}{y}$$
Multiply both sides by $y$:
$$\frac{y}{5b}=9x$$

steps.title: Isolate x
steps.content: Divide both sides by $9$: $$\frac{y}{45b}=x$$ So the equivalent equation is: $$x=\frac{y}{45b}$$ The answer is C.
